subcodes.first_line: O divine friends! The esteemed Ishaq Rahmani offered utmost praise for your love and kindness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران الهی حضرت اسحق رحمانی نهایت ستایش را از محبت و مهربانی شما نمودند
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @love and unity, @call to action, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
